questions.q: Who wrote the Declaration of Independence?
questions.explanation: Thomas Jefferson was its main author.
It was written at the Constitutional Convention in 1787.

questions.q: Who was the first President of the United States?
questions.explanation: Washington is called the 'Father of Our Country.'

questions.q: What did the Emancipation Proclamation do?
options: Freed enslaved people in the Confederate states
questions.explanation: Lincoln issued it during the Civil War in 1863.

questions.q: Name one war fought by the United States in the 1900s.
questions.explanation: WWI, WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and the Cold War were all 1900s conflicts.
